---
title: "Flexible Calibration of Multi-Channel Sensors"
description: "A flexible calibration method for photometric and radiometric measurements with compact, low-cost multi-channel sensors."
canonical-url: "https://optolab-unimore.github.io/projects/items/multichannel-calibration.html"
date: 2026-06-01
categories: [Publication, Spectral sensing, Calibration]
---

::: {.status-pill}
Published research · 2026
:::

## Research context

Compact multi-channel sensors can support photometric and radiometric measurements when their spectral response and calibration chain are treated explicitly.

## Published work

The work presents a flexible calibration method that relates multi-channel measurements to photometric and radiometric quantities. It was developed by Alberto Besozzi, Giovanni Gibertoni, Luigi Rovati and Agostino Gibaldi and published in *Acta IMEKO*.

## Outputs

- [Institutional record (IRIS)](https://iris.unimore.it/handle/11380/1412808)
- [Publication DOI](https://doi.org/10.21014/actaimeko.v15i2.2267)
- [Code repository](https://github.com/OPTOLAB-UNIMORE/Calibration-Method-for-Multi-Channel-Sensor)
